title: tricliceras schinzii subsp. laceratum
intro: Tricliceras schinzii subsp. laceratum, also known as the bitter leaf plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Tricliceras schinzii subsp. laceratum is often used as a tea or infusion, with some cultures also using it as a poultice or tincture.
